display.purpose: Hero H1 only, the approved copy verbatim.

headline.purpose: Section headings (problem, solution, social proof, final CTA).

title.purpose: Subtitles and card headings within a section.

label.purpose: Labels, captions, metadata, and CTA button text.

shadows.name: cta-hover
shadows.purpose: Soft purple-tinted lift on the primary WhatsApp button on hover/focus.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default ease-out for hover/focus transitions; no bounce or elastic.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The WhatsApp CTA, repeated identically across every section.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #6B4A8E; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 16px 32px; border: none; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover, .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { background: #4A3163; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(74, 49, 99, 0.25); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #B89DCE; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Used for 'Ver cómo llegar' (Google Maps) alongside the primary WhatsApp CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #6B4A8E; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 14px 30px; border: 2px solid #6B4A8E; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover, .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { background: #EDE8F5; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #B89DCE; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: Used for the differentiator (experience with children) and feature/solution sections.
components.html:
Cuidado pensado para tu hijo

Sabemos que un niño con miedo a las agujas necesita más que rapidez: necesita paciencia.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #EDE8F5; color: #142129; border-radius: 20px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card__title { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.25rem; line-height: 1.3; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card__body { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #142129; margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; }

narrative.overview: dúolab is a clinical analysis lab talking to a parent who is already a little anxious. The system's job is to read as confident and capable without ever sounding like a hospital form letter. Authority comes from the brand's own deep purple (#6B4A8E) and from precision in layout and copy, not from clinical white-and-blue sterility or dense data displays. Warmth comes from soft lila/white grounds, generous spacing, and one consistent voice: cercano, claro, profesional, tranquilizador. This system explicitly rejects: cold institutional hospital-site language and visuals; generic AI-template SaaS landing pages (gradient-to-blue heroes, gradient text, identical icon-card grids, hero-metric blocks, tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows, numbered section scaffolding, decorative glassmorphism); and stock-photo sterility in place of concrete, specific trust signals.
keyCharacteristics: One saturated brand purple carries authority; everything else stays quiet around it.
Generous whitespace and soft lila grounds, never sharp clinical white-on-white.
A single typeface (Plus Jakarta Sans) doing all the work through weight, not mixed fonts.
Pill-shaped, unmistakably tappable CTAs — there is exactly one action on this page and it should never be ambiguous.
Calm pacing: no urgency tactics, no countdown energy, no aggressive motion.

rules.name: The One Purple Rule
rules.body: Morado Principal is the only saturated color on the page. Lila Medio and Lila Claro are tints of the same hue, not competing accents — there is no second brand color.

rules.name: The No Cold-White Rule
rules.body: Don't default every section to pure white. Alternate Blanco with Fondo Suave or Lila Claro so the page has rhythm instead of reading like a clinical waiting room.

rules.name: The Weight-Not-Width Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is built by moving up and down the Plus Jakarta Sans weight scale (300-800), never by introducing a second font family.

rules.name: The Tint-Not-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Depth between sections comes from alternating background tints (Blanco / Fondo Suave / Lila Claro), not from box-shadows on cards. A card at rest has no shadow.

dos: Do keep Morado Principal as the only saturated color on the page.
Do alternate Blanco / Fondo Suave / Lila Claro across sections for rhythm.
Do use pill-shaped buttons (999px) for every CTA, identical everywhere.
Do carry hierarchy through Plus Jakarta Sans weight alone.
Do give the children-experience section distinct visual weight.
Do write copy in the visitor's own language.
donts: Don't use generic AI-template SaaS patterns: gradient heroes, gradient text, identical icon-card grids, hero-metric blocks, uppercase tracked eyebrows, numbered section markers, decorative glassmorphism.
Don't add drop shadows to cards at rest.
Don't introduce a second font family.
Don't use Gris Texto body text on tinted backgrounds without checking contrast.
Don't use cold institutional language, medical jargon, 'Contáctenos,' or any insurance/IMSS mention.
Don't fill social proof with generic or placeholder testimonials.
Don't use bounce/elastic easing on CTA hover.
